_description: Path mapping for TrimUI Brick running NextUI. Maps canonical system names to local save directories.
_rom_roots_note: Informational. Runtime ROM-anchoring reads $CONTINUITY_ROMS_ROOT from the PAL (Roms/), not this field. On-device ROM folder names (Roms/<TAG> vs Roms/<Display (TAG)>) must be confirmed on hardware before migrate_repo.sh is run against the live saves repo — see sprint-2.0 out-of-scope. pm_rom_dir handles both forms.
